Exploratory Data test RNAseq

Uwe Schwartz

19/04/2024”

Dependencies & Libraries

Load packages

library(DESeq2)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggrepel)
library(stringr)
library(pheatmap)
load("/Volumes//admin///Library/Mobile Documents/com~apple~CloudDocs/Organisation_NAC/Cooperate_Design/colors/nac_palette_extend.rda")
palette(nac_palette_extend)
#palette(unique(c(brewer.pal(9,"Set1"),brewer.pal(8,"Set2"))))

##Import data

# load 
# load count table from featureCounts
count.table<-read.delim("counts/count_table.txt", skip=1)

# get features
id<-str_split_i(colnames(count.table)[7:ncol(count.table)],"_",3)

colnames(count.table)[7:ncol(count.table)]<-id
counts<-count.table[,7:ncol(count.table)]
rownames(counts)<-as.character(count.table$Geneid)

## prepare meta Data
#
meta.DATA<-data.frame(id,
           genotype=NA,
           treatment=NA,
           row.names = id)
#genotype
Ctrl<-c("46302","46402","46403","46622","47063","47155","46587","46588","46731","47157","47221","48986")
H77L<-c("46621","47592","46732","48813","48814","48975","47067","47222","47991","47993","48638","48982")
C118F<-c("46301","46381","47151","47672","49335","50093","47614","47615","50091","50095","50096")
  
meta.DATA[Ctrl,"genotype"]<-"Ctrl"
meta.DATA[H77L,"genotype"]<-"H77L"
meta.DATA[C118F,"genotype"]<-"C118F"


#treatment  
DMSO<-c("46302","46402","46403","46622","47063","47155","46621","47592","46732","48813","48814","48975","46301","46381","47151","47672","49335","50093")
PS341<-c("46587","46588","46731","47157","47221","48986","47067","47222","47991","47993","48638","48982","47614","47615","50091","50095","50096")



meta.DATA[DMSO,"treatment"]<-"DMSO"
meta.DATA[PS341,"treatment"]<-"PS341"


meta.DATA
##          id genotype treatment
## 48982 48982     H77L     PS341
## 47151 47151    C118F      DMSO
## 47672 47672    C118F      DMSO
## 46588 46588     Ctrl     PS341
## 47614 47614    C118F     PS341
## 46587 46587     Ctrl     PS341
## 48814 48814     H77L      DMSO
## 46732 46732     H77L      DMSO
## 47155 47155     Ctrl      DMSO
## 47157 47157     Ctrl     PS341
## 47222 47222     H77L     PS341
## 46403 46403     Ctrl      DMSO
## 46402 46402     Ctrl      DMSO
## 46301 46301    C118F      DMSO
## 46731 46731     Ctrl     PS341
## 48638 48638     H77L     PS341
## 47221 47221     Ctrl     PS341
## 47067 47067     H77L     PS341
## 46622 46622     Ctrl      DMSO
## 47063 47063     Ctrl      DMSO
## 48813 48813     H77L      DMSO
## 47615 47615    C118F     PS341
## 47991 47991     H77L     PS341
## 47592 47592     H77L      DMSO
## 47993 47993     H77L     PS341
## 46621 46621     H77L      DMSO
## 46381 46381    C118F      DMSO
## 46302 46302     Ctrl      DMSO
## 48986 48986     Ctrl     PS341
## 49335 49335    C118F      DMSO
## 48975 48975     H77L      DMSO
## 50091 50091    C118F     PS341
## 50095 50095    C118F     PS341
## 50093 50093    C118F      DMSO
## 50096 50096    C118F     PS341
## create DESeq obj
dds.obj <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(countData = counts,
                                   colData = meta.DATA,
                                   design= ~treatment+genotype)

Analysis

# rlog tranformation 
rld<-rlog(dds.obj)
## rlog() may take a few minutes with 30 or more samples,
## vst() is a much faster transformation
## plot PCA

### variables
#my.pal<-c(brewer.pal(9,"Set1"))
my.pal<-nac_palette_extend
object<-rld
ntop=1000
var.symb<-"treatment"
var.col="genotype"
intgroup=c(var.col,var.symb )
returnData=F
###

rv <- rowVars(assay(object)) 
select <- order(rv, decreasing = TRUE)[seq_len(min(ntop,length(rv)))]

pca <- prcomp(t(assay(object)[select, ]))
percentVar <- pca$sdev^2/sum(pca$sdev^2)


# varaince covered by PC
barplot(percentVar, names.arg = paste0("PCA", 1:length(percentVar)),
          ylab="variance", cex.names = 0.5)

intgroup.df <- as.data.frame(colData(object)[,intgroup,drop = FALSE])
group <- if (length(intgroup) > 1) {
  factor(apply(intgroup.df, 1, paste, collapse = " : "))
} else {
  colData(object)[[intgroup]]
}

# show first two components
i=1
d <- data.frame(PCx = pca$x[, i], PCy = pca$x[, i+1], group = group, 
                  intgroup.df, name=colData(dds.obj)[colnames(object),"id"])

g<-ggplot(data = d, aes_string(x = "PCx", y = "PCy", color = var.col,
                               shape=var.symb)) +
      geom_point(size = 5, stroke=1.1) + theme_bw()+xlab(paste0("PC",i," : ",
                                round(percentVar[i] * 100), "% variance"))+
      ylab(paste0("PC",i+1,": ", round(percentVar[i+1] *100),
                  "% variance"))+scale_fill_manual(values=my.pal)
g

## similarity clustering
colors <- colorRampPalette( rev(brewer.pal(9, "Blues")) )(255)

sampleDists <- dist(t(assay(rld)))

sampleDistMatrix <- as.matrix( sampleDists )
rownames(sampleDistMatrix) <-paste(rld$id,rld$genotype,rld$treatment,sep="_")
colnames(sampleDistMatrix) <- NULL

pheatmap(sampleDistMatrix,
         clustering_distance_rows = sampleDists,
         clustering_distance_cols = sampleDists,
         col = colors)

## 1000 most variable genes

rv <- rowVars(assay(rld))   
select <- order(rv, decreasing = TRUE)[1:1000]
mat <-assay(rld)[select,]

anno<-as.data.frame(colData(rld)[,c(var.col,var.symb)])

anno_colors=list()

lv.col<-levels(colData(dds.obj)[,var.col])
anno_colors[[var.col]]<-c(brewer.pal(length(lv.col), "Set1"))[1:length(lv.col)]
names(anno_colors[[var.col]])<-lv.col

lv.symb<-levels(as.factor(colData(dds.obj)[,var.symb])) 
anno_colors[[var.symb]]<-c(brewer.pal(length(lv.symb), "Set2"))[1:length(lv.symb)]
names(anno_colors[[var.symb]])<-lv.symb


pheatmap(mat, annotation_col = anno,scale="row", show_rownames = F,
               annotation_colors =anno_colors)

############ get TPMs
#check
all.equal(rownames(counts),count.table$Geneid)
## [1] TRUE
## [1] TRUE
#divide by length
rpk <- counts/(count.table$Length/1e3)
tpm.mat <- t( t(rpk) * 1e6 / colSums(rpk) )
colnames(tpm.mat)<-paste0("TPM_", colnames(tpm.mat))    

head(tpm.mat)
